Class Food

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.items.Item
simcli.entities.items.Consumable
simcli.entities.items.Food
All Implemented Interfaces:
Savable, Interactable
public class Food extends Consumable
A consumable food item that restores hunger and energy but provides no happiness bonus. Purchased from the grocery shelf.

Food is a specialized Consumable with a fixed happiness value of zero, distinguishing basic nutrition from premium consumables that may grant additional mood benefits.

    Constructs a new food item with no happiness bonus.

  • Constructor Details

    • Food

      public Food(String name, int price, int satiationValue, int energyValue)
      Constructs a new food item with no happiness bonus.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of the food.
      price - the purchase price in Simoleons.
      satiationValue - the hunger points restored on consumption.
      energyValue - the energy points restored on consumption.

  • Method Details

    • copyItem

      public Item copyItem()
      Creates a deep copy of this item for inventory/shop duplication.
      Overrides:
      copyItem in class Consumable
      Returns:
      a new Food with identical properties.

    • toSaveString

      public String toSaveString()
      Converts the object state into a string format suitable for saving.
      Specified by:
      toSaveString in interface Savable
      Overrides:
      toSaveString in class Consumable
      Returns:
      a CSV-formatted string: Food,name,price,satiation,energy.
